issue_title: Room Header size and scrollarea margin
issue_body_preview:
## Describe the bug

The sizes of the header and the margin-top of the messages scroll area does not fit.
This causes the scroll up button to disappear half.

https://github.com/antoine92190/vue-advanced-chat/blob/472563d4882ea873c69f5f8ee739eee90b673228/src/lib/Room/RoomHeader/RoomHeader.scss#
test_description_zh: 打开聊天室页面，观察聊天室顶部标题栏（Room Header）与消息滚动区域之间的布局关系。向上滚动消息列表，使"滚动到顶部"按钮出现，检查该按钮是否完整可见。
expected_result_zh: 聊天室标题栏的高度与消息滚动区域的上边距（margin-top）应正确匹配，不存在重叠或间距异常。当向上滚动消息时出现的滚动按钮应完整显示，不被标题栏遮挡或截断。
